meta.description: API contract registry — all endpoints from TOON dataSource + story specs.
meta.scaffold_note: No endpoints declared by the screens yet (0 of 36 screens declare a REST dataSource/endpoint). This is a SCAFFOLD, not an empty contract: reads run inline in Server Components and mutations go through server actions, so most features need no route handler. Populate this when a real external REST contract (cron / webhook / third-party) appears.
